title: stachys palustris var. segetalis
intro: Stachys palustris var. segetalis, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe, known for its distinctive square stem and leaves with a hairy underside. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys palustris var. segetalis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herb can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues.
